defaultValue.description: The initial value to copy when uncontrolled.

id.description: The unique identifier of the clipboard.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; input: string; label: string }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the clipboard. Useful for composition.

statusChange.description: Emits when the copy status changes.

timeout.description: The timeout for the copied state, in milliseconds.

translations.description: The localized strings for the clipboard.

value.description: The controlled value to copy to the clipboard.
The clipboard machine returned by useClipboard().
